author: Noirceuil LeSombre
review: Caveat: review based solely on usefulness for online shoppers. The website does NOT provide relevant info provided by competitors. Response is satisfactory but falls well short of providing value.

author: Myah Carrier
review: I lived at Blue Mountain Village Apartments for 3 years with minimal issues. Ness management ruined it less than 2 months of them taking over.

author: Emma Christine
review: DO NOT LEASE THROUGH THEM they allow a dangerous man to harass, physically threaten and traumatized residents and children and gaslight residents who have piles of evidence and are scared for their lives. What a shame! Pure slumelords

author: Brett S.
review: Ness Property Management LLC are the new owners that have taken over a few apartment buildings which previously were ran by Whatcom Property Management. So far, they have cleaned up a bit, cut down the trees that shaded the south side of

author: Jennifer
review: The management was attentive and the rent was lower than other similar properties. The other tenants were sometimes annoying, but that's anywhere.

author: David Mar
review: Much like others, I've dealt with ongoing issues regarding Ness not performing maintenance. They bought multiple properties in the Bellingham area around the same time, but they clearly didn't have the financial capacity / desire to

author: C B
review: Worst management outfit I've ever dealt with. Raised rent too high and ppl on fixed incomes couldn't stay. Then charged me for taking MY OWN ac unit i bought. The rooves all leak and there are water damages to ceilings. Yet this management blames and charges tenants for it and mold around the windows.

author: Dan Payne
review: Shortly after they bought the property I resided in, they increased the rent by a substantial amount and skimped on overall maintenance.  The gutters were in dire need of being cleaned and the groundskeeping kind of went by wayside.  There

author: Wren Cash
review:
This is for BMVA in Pendleton, Oregon

When I signed the lease over a month ago I was not told that electric was not

author: Cortney Howisey
review: I wish I could rate Ness Management a zero. I will never rent from them again. My apartment which I had rented for 2.5 years was bought out in November. When it was bought out they raised my rent 120 per month. I tried to negotiate and they

author: Travis Willmarth
review: I have lived in the same building for 5 years. Ness bought the property and in a matter of months have caused me to want to move out. With poor communication, raising rent without notice, and not taking care of the property they have pushed

author: Vallarie Ricque
review: Very poor management, were going on 5 WEEKS since I put a maintenance request for my bathtub to be fixed. Im having to scrub the tub everytime a shower or bath happens its very frustrating I have a 2 year old and month old baby. Definitely not worth what theyre raising the rent too.

author: Cameron H
review: While my unit is pretty much average for the overpriced Seattle area, I have to say my landlord (Jen) is awesome. She is always quick to respond to inquiries and issues I have at my apartment. My building is quite rundown, but it's to be expected at this price point and that's more of an issue with the property owner (not manager).

author: Xander Maresh
review: Slum lords. Maintenance never gets done. They will fraudulently take your deposit. Management has a high turnover. DO NOT RENT FROM THIS COMPANY. 0/10

author: Kathy Mckenner
review: A zero is what they deserve, unwilling to make repairs and fix what needs to be done. Requested 10 times for them to fix mold and carpet tacks coming up. They never fix anything, I reported them to housing and BBB

author: rick Coberly Jr
review: This company Is a joke. The raised our rent with ant notices and told us we were late in paying. They are terrible to get ahold of. I would not recommend this property management unless you are desperate

author: Joann Allen
review: Poorly managed in Great Falls MT.
